name: HBM V2 - Time Rewind
description: Snapshot-based Time Rewind system for Geometry Dash. Hold the bound key (default: N) to rewind up to 5 seconds of gameplay in Normal Mode.

rewind-duration.name: Rewind Buffer Depth (s)
rewind-duration.description: How many seconds of gameplay are kept in the ring buffer.

snapshot-interval.name: Snapshot Interval (ticks)
snapshot-interval.description: Physics ticks between checkpoints. Higher = smaller buffer, coarser rewind.

rewind-speed.name: Rewind Speed (x)
rewind-speed.description: How many snapshots to consume per rendered frame while rewinding.
